commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer-authored, security-adjacent approval UX/protocol PR with no narrow repair defect identified; maintainer review and required checks should gate merge.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the diff adds approval metadata, rendering, generated protocol output, tests, and a changelog entry without new dependencies, workflows, permissions, secre... (sha=1c5ecaa14aa5c1833027f8c68675299507d13aa8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-derived command span metadata to exec approval registration and gateway protocol flow, renders highlighted shell command fragments in the Web Control UI approval modal, and adds tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a reported bug. Source inspection gives a clear before/after path: current main lacks `commandSpans`, while the PR head adds parser-backed metadata through gateway validation and Web rendering tests.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-authored, security-adjacent approval UX/protocol PR with no narrow repair defect identified; maintainer review and required checks should gate merge.
